original_snippet_context: Article discussing Campos Salles' invitation to preside over the Caixa de Conversão and his subsequent refusal.
relevant_quote: O sr. dr. Campos Salles considera o novo apparelho econômico um factor positivo da nossa futura grandeza. E' um apologista sincero da Caixa de Conversão.
justification: Campos Salles' description of the Caixa as a 'positive factor for our future greatness' aligns with the expansionist view of the Caixa as a tool for economic development and future prosperity.
